_schema_note: 1.1 = test_results split into backend/frontend sub-objects (established W10); everything else mirrors the W9 1.0 shape.

resolution.summary: Wave-2 QA for the W11b 'sim texture' batch (EM-079 commitments, EM-080 reflection, EM-081 overhearing, EM-083 real blackout + usage alerts, EM-087/103 renewal + commemorative monuments, EM-091 billboard, EM-092 personas, EM-098 procgen, EM-100 readable rule text, EM-101 from_snapshot + fork). Delivered: (1) backend/tests/test_w11b.py — 46 new tests pinning the full v1.3.0/v1.4.0 contract surface with scripted per-agent providers and prompt capture (the EM-079/080/081 context-injection seams are asserted on the literal system prompt, so 'zero extra LLM calls' is verified by construction); (2) 44 new frontend tests in 7 files: groupTimeline/renewalsByRule (incl. historical 3xUBI-shaped data), PersonaPicker states + pick semantics, the SpawnForm persona prefill/edit-wins flow through ControlPanel, UsageAlertBanner latest-per-provider+metric + seq-keyed dismissal re-arm, RunBrowser fork affordance + lineage chips, BillboardPanel sources/god-ink/empty state, and the W11b feed-idiom smoke (phantom 👻, ⚑, ✎, ✦ god, ↻ renewed, ⑂). All validation gates re-run green; zero src files modified; existing tests untouched; findings below are observations only (1 cosmetic dead-code item, 1 pre-existing LOW gate gap, 3 in-contract behavior notes).

contract_conformance.notes: Verified against event-log.md v1.3.0 + api.openapi.yaml v1.4.0 + frontend-inspector.md v1.3.0 §10 + the W11B_BUILD.md gate-log deviations, with native pins on every sharp edge. Commitments: commitment_made carries {commitment_id, text} and the promise rides the NEXT prompt's YOUR ACTIVE COMMITMENTS block (asserted on the captured system prompt, absent on the first turn); a promise lapses commitment_lapsed{reason:'phantom'} after exactly phantom_after_turns talk-only turns; a real resolution tool call keeps it SILENTLY (no event, store drained); cap 5 evicts the oldest with no lapse event. Reflection: the in-prompt request appears ONLY when the importance accumulator trips (weights from the same single response), the event carries {text, importance}, the accumulator resets, and the diary entry enters the agent's memory buffer; below threshold = no request line + no event. Overhearing adds NO kinds: the spoken line lands in exactly the 2 lowest-id co-located listeners' next perceived payload as overheard_speech[{...overheard:true}], the 3rd bystander and the speaker get nothing, a whisper's addressee is excluded, pending lines cap at 2 newest. Renewal: re-proposing an identical ACTIVE effect tags renewal_of, passes as proposal status 'renewed', refreshes the original (renewed_at), emits rule_passed{renewed:true, rule_id:<original>, renewal_proposal_id} — and the world NEVER holds two active identical effects (the 3xUBI invariant pinned directly), while different effects still stack. Commemorative: name-matched projects carry payload {commemorative:true, rule_id} + Building.commemorates; the second monument is rejected (commemorative_duplicate); unrelated projects are untagged. EM-100: rule_proposed/rule_vote/rule_rejected (and both rule_passed variants) lead with the quoted rule text + effect tag, the uuid appears in payload only — asserted id-not-in-text per row. Billboard: post gated to plaza/townhall by BOTH the validator and the world action; cap 20 newest; snapshot/world_state shape [{tick, actor_id, actor_type, text}]; POST /api/billboard 201 emits actor_type 'god' with in_reply_to, 422 on empty/whitespace/281+; read_billboard injects '[billboard, by X]' lines into the memory buffer. Procgen: default OFF leaves the hand-authored town byte-identical (json-compared); enabled is deterministic per seed, guarantees gov('townhall' id, the billboard gate)/work/wild/social, builds per-agent cottages + The Bunkhouse with capacity agents-1, clamps stranded agents to the plaza, caps the town proper at 12 even for n_places=999. Blackout: home places dark for blackout_ticks, recharge rejected (no credit charge) by world AND validator, restored at expiry with structure_state_changed blackout->powered emitted via both inject_random_event and the loop's per-turn expiry. from_snapshot: full to->from->to dict equality on a textured world (rules incl. renewal bookkeeping, commemorative building, animal, billboard, blackout, scheduler state, relationships), running always restores False, place_overrides replace wholesale, and the documented beliefs limit (count serialized, contents not) is pinned explicitly. Fork: 201 with honest snapshot-grain forked_at_tick (5 for a requested 9, with the note; no note when exact), the forked run is live-paused at the snapshot tick with billboard intact, RunRow lineage columns populate, is_active moves to the fork, first event is run_forked{parent_run_id, tick}; 404 unknown run; 400 for negative/over-max ticks, malformed place_overrides (str/ints/dict), and a snapshotless run. Personas: GET serves the 10-card library with the exact 4-key shape; loader returns [] for missing/malformed/wrong-shape yaml and drops nameless cards; spawn prefills name/personality/suggested_profile from the card, explicit fields win, and the deviation-accepted 400s (unknown persona, missing name/profile, unknown profile) are parametrized. Usage alerts: 70% crossing emits exactly once per provider/metric/window for rpd AND tpd, UTC-day rollover re-arms, no caps = no alerts + no state, malformed caps dropped, and the app sink lands a system-actor usage_alert row with the contract payload.

test_coverage.notes: Backend +46 (252 total): commitments 4, reflection 2, overhearing 3 (2 loop-integration + 1 unit for the pending cap, which round-robin scheduling cannot reach end-to-end), renewal 2, EM-100 1, commemorative 3, billboard 5, procgen 3, blackout 2, from_snapshot 3, fork 5, personas 8 (incl. the 4-case 400 parametrize), usage alerts 5. The cognition tests use a per-agent scripted provider that captures every system prompt, so the EM-079/080/081 prompt seams are asserted literally rather than inferred. Frontend +44 (150 total / 23 files): GovernanceHistory helpers 7, PersonaPicker 7, ControlPanel persona prefill/edit-wins 3, UsageAlertBanner 5, RunBrowser fork+lineage 7 (new file — the W11a RunBrowser.test.tsx kept read-only), BillboardPanel 7, EventFeed W11b idioms 8. Honest gaps: (a) blackout's no-home-places fallback (first two places go dark) is untested; (b) procgen kind_weights skew and the duplicate-name counter paths are untested (determinism + minimums + caps are); (c) the commitment 'expired' lapse reason exists in the contract union but the engine only emits 'phantom' — the feed's expired idiom is tested against a synthetic event; (d) BillboardPanel's localStorage collapse persistence and the 3D board are untested (jsdom; gate-3 Playwright territory); (e) frontend mock-generator parity for the new kinds is covered only via the feed accepting the shapes, not via generator-output assertions; (f) carried from W10/W11a: useSimulation internals remain hook-internal and untested.

security.notes: No new runtime surface from wave 2 (test files only; tsc -b + vite build re-verified clean). Wave-1 surface reviewed while testing: POST /api/billboard caps text at 280 via pydantic (422 before the handler) and the engine re-caps at BILLBOARD_TEXT_CAP on every append/restore path; fork validates run existence (parameterized SELECT) and tick range before touching the engine, place_overrides are shape-checked to a list of dicts (400, never a 500), and World.from_snapshot coerces every field defensively (TypeError/ValueError/KeyError -> 400); persona spawn keeps the B15 length caps and resolves cards server-side by exact name (unknown -> 400, no path/file input); load_personas is fail-soft (never 500) and serves only the 4 whitelisted string fields; UsageAlertTracker drops malformed caps at construction and the sink is exception-swallowing (alerting can never break a turn). No real API keys anywhere (scripted fakes; conftest pins EM_DB_PATH=':memory:'). Local-lab posture (unauthenticated god endpoints incl. /api/billboard and /api/runs/fork — fork swaps the LIVE world) unchanged and accepted by design; noted that fork is a destructive-ish live-session swap reachable without auth, consistent with the existing reset/spawn/kill surface.

regression_risk.notes: Zero src files modified and zero existing test files modified (W11a's RunBrowser/EventFeed suites extended via NEW sibling files instead). All 206 pre-existing backend tests pass alongside the 46 new (252/252); all 106 pre-existing frontend tests pass alongside the 44 new (150/150, 23 files). Validations: pytest 252/252; vitest 150/150; npx tsc -b clean; npm run build clean (pre-existing >500kB chunk warning only); eslint clean on all 7 new frontend test files. New tests are deterministic and offline: scripted per-agent providers (no network, no timers), background animal/narrator tasks drained per turn, seeded procgen asserted by construction, the usage-alert day window driven by an injected clock, and TestClient lifespans isolated per test (each fork/spawn test gets a fresh in-memory world).

frontend.changed_existing: none — all W11a/W10 test files are byte-identical; new coverage lives in sibling files

test_results.frontend_verification: cd web && npx tsc -b — clean; npm run build — clean (pre-existing >500kB chunk warning only); npx eslint on all 7 new test files — clean

issues.title: Governance location gate is prompt-only: propose_rule/vote are not location-checked at resolution time (pre-existing, not W11b)
issues.detail: TOOL_REGISTRY (agents/runtime.py) declares location_gate:'governance' for propose_rule/vote and its header comment says '_validate_world enforces the same gates at resolution time', but _validate_world's propose_rule branch checks only the effect and the vote branch only rule existence/status — a model that ignores the shrunken valid_actions list can legislate from anywhere. Discovered while building the renewal tests (they pass with agents at the townhall either way). Pre-existing W7-era behavior, out of W11b scope and unowned by wave 2 (src is findings-only); routed as a finding for plan-intake.

issues.title: BillboardPanel computes a 'THE WATCHERS' display name for god posts that is never rendered (dead value)
issues.detail: PostRow (web/src/components/feed/BillboardPanel.tsx:155) sets name = 'THE WATCHERS' when post.actor_type==='god', but the god render branch shows only the ✦ god chip — the name is rendered exclusively on the non-god path. Cosmetic dead code; either render the name in the god row or drop the computation. The test pins the ACTUAL contract (chip-only attribution) so a future change is visible.

issues.title: Commitment 'kept' matching is positional, not semantic (in-contract)
issues.detail: Any successful resolution-class tool call (work/forage/give/recharge/propose_project/contribute_funds/build_step/repair) marks the OLDEST commitment kept, regardless of whether the action relates to the promise — a forage 'keeps' 'I will repair the mill'. This is exactly EM-079's specified semantics (free-scale: no LLM judging of follow-through), recorded so nobody mistakes an unrelated keep for a bug. The phantom path (the headline failure mode) is unaffected.

issues.title: Overhearing listener selection is deterministic lowest-id (in-contract)
issues.detail: With 3+ co-located bystanders the SAME two lowest-id agents always overhear (runtime._distribute_overheard sorts by id and slices 2). Deterministic and contract-conformant ('≤2 co-located listeners, hard cap'), but it biases who develops social context in crowded places. If texture matters later, a seeded shuffle would spread it without cost.

issues.title: commitment_lapsed reason 'expired' is contract-reachable but engine-unreachable
issues.detail: event-log.md v1.3.0 types reason as 'phantom'|'expired', and the feed has a ⌛ idiom for the expired case, but _advance_commitments only ever emits reason:'phantom' (kept promises drop silently; there is no age-based expiry distinct from staleness). The feed's expired rendering is therefore tested against a synthetic event. Harmless forward-compat; noted so a future expiry feature knows the consumer is already ready.

gate_decision.reason: All W11b wave-2 QA objectives delivered and every gate is green: backend 252/252 (46 new tests pinning commitments/reflection/overhearing prompt seams literally via captured system prompts, the 3×UBI renewal invariant, commemorative one-per-rule, EM-100 uuid-free feed text, billboard gating/cap/god surface, seeded procgen with the ≤12 cap, real blackout lifecycle, from_snapshot round-trip incl. the documented beliefs limit, snapshot-grain fork with honest tick + full 404/400 matrix, the 10-card persona library with the accepted 400 deviations, and once-per-window usage alerts with rollover re-arm), frontend 150/150 across 23 files (44 new tests for the ×N grouping + renewal helpers, persona picker + prefill/edit-wins, usage banner re-arm, fork affordance + lineage chips, billboard panel, and the new feed idioms), tsc -b + vite build + eslint clean, zero src and zero existing-test modifications. No contract violations found; the five recorded items are two LOW observations (a pre-existing prompt-only governance gate and a cosmetic dead value in BillboardPanel) and three in-contract behavior notes. GREEN to proceed to gate 3 (orchestrator live Playwright verification).
